name: Brocoli Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 package Good Seasons Italian salad mix
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the broccoli florets, shredded cheddar cheese, drained kidney beans, halved cherry tomatoes, thinly sliced onion, and sliced fresh mushrooms.
2. Add the Italian salad mix to the bowl and gently toss until all ingredients are evenly distributed.
3. Cover the bowl and refrigerate for at least 4 hours or overnight to allow flavors to meld.
